problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
hypothesis: If Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells is applied to chemistry, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
